description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a wooden fixed stock and handguard with a dark metallic receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle has a prominent curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK family, and a standard-length barrel with a front post iron sight and a slanted muzzle brake. The receiver is robust and boxy, with a visible trigger guard and selector switch area. The handguard and stock are made of wood, providing a distinct reddish-brown contrast to the black metal components. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on durability and function.
description: A classic AK-47 style rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. It features iron sights and a slanted muzzle brake.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the narrow profile, with the muzzle brake and front sight post visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with the wooden stock, handguard, and magazine clearly visible.
description_view_3: View from the stock end, showing the slim profile of the rifle and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
